title: Services people often compare after shortlisting a Dutch city
intro: Once a few cities look realistic, many expats line up **housing search**, **relocation** help, **banking**, **mandatory health insurance**, and **mobile** in parallel — especially if a move date or employer support is in play. Scope, credentials, and pricing differ; confirm what is included and whether your employer contributes before you commit.
disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects relevance to city choice and Dutch setup, not pay-to-rank. This is not legal, tax, or immigration advice — verify outcomes with employers, municipalities, or qualified advisers.
